visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a lavender long-sleeved shirt under a black vest, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is positioned in front of large wooden crates filled with red nectarines. She makes playful gestures towards her head while smiling at the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on a clear plastic bag of nectarines the woman is holding. The bag features a blue and red label with 'White Nectarines' written on it. She rotates the bag to inspect the fruit from different angles. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room. Two women are sitting at a dark wood table. One is the woman from the warehouse, and the other has her hair in pigtails and wears a dark green turtleneck. They are eating sliced nectarines from small white and blue ceramic plates, showing the internal white flesh of the fruit to the camera while reacting positively.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 在幹嘛. (3) [Variety]: 脆甜買 1顆30元 智力買甜桃. (4) [Subtitle]: 智力買甜...智力. 那你看起來有點缺乏智力. 哈哈. (5) [Subtitle]: 這個很新哦. 239元有1.3公斤. (6) [Subtitle]: 哇 這批看起來很漂亮喔. 這種就是脆桃 跟一般水蜜桃. (7) [Variety]: 脆桃. (8) [Subtitle]: 這個漂亮 但這裡有個小傷口. 可是 在頭的地方也還好啦. (9) [Variety]: 智力白甜桃 1.3公斤 239元 裡面有8顆 一顆平均是30塊. (10) [Subtitle]: 超划算. 它的白甜桃呢 口感非常的清脆 然後又有水分. (11) [Subtitle]: 就它的水分感是非常夠 不会乾乾硬硬. 因为以前吃那個甜桃很刮喉嚨 這個完全不會. (12) [Subtitle]: 而且它的皮超級無敵香 就是那種白桃的那種甜脆香. (13) [Variety]: 超級無敵香. (14) [Subtitle]: 它的甜度呢 比較低 所以在控糖的人也算是OK啦. (15) [Subtitle]: 但是 它的味道 非常的清甜 所以你不會覺得你在吃一個沒有味道 或不够甜的水果. (16) [Subtitle]: 反而是在吃一個非常清脆的水蜜桃. 水蜜桃派也會懂 脆桃派的人 就是這袋. (17) [Variety]: 非常清脆的水蜜桃. (18) [Subtitle]: 推薦這一批.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 4 shoppers and staff visible in the warehouse background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long, straight black hair, wearing a lavender long-sleeved shirt and a black sleeveless vest. The second woman has black hair styled in pigtails and wears a dark green turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a large Costco warehouse with industrial shelving, pallets of produce, and other shoppers. The second location is a home interior with a couch, a shelf containing various toys, and a dining table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice greets the audience with playful questions. A male voice behind the camera laughs and teases her. An upbeat, major-key acoustic guitar BGM with light percussion starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) A 'bubble pop' SFX triggers as the speaker shifts to describing the nectarines. She details the price and weight in a professional but enthusiastic narrative tone. Sounds of crinkling plastic bags are clearly audible as she handles the product. (3) A 'ding' SFX marks the scene transition to the indoor review. Two female voices alternate rapidly, describing the taste and texture with high arousal. Crisp 'crunch' sounds from eating the fruit are emphasized in the mix. The BGM remains steady in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Selection -> Taste Test Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to recommend a specific type of white nectarine found at Costco. It combines the 'shopping haul' experience with a detailed taste-test review to convince viewers of the product's value and quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing breakdown, positive taste evaluation, and clear showing of the store location and product packaging.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media lifestyle vlog. The use of variety-show style subtitles and sound effects creates a fast, engaging pace suitable for short-form platforms.
